summary: Bug fix verification for Navigation & Structure page - PUT merge behavior and toggle-group isolation. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests confirmed: 1) When working on specific group (e.g., Flooring), clicking X calls PATCH toggle-group endpoint (not DELETE), 2) When working on 'All Groups', clicking X shows confirmation dialog before global delete, 3) Spec values are filtered by selected product group.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend PUT endpoints correctly implement MERGE strategy - preserves all existing values and only adds new ones
Backend toggle-group PATCH endpoints correctly set product_groups array for group isolation
Frontend handleRemoveSpecValue correctly checks selectedProductGroup to decide between toggle-group PATCH and global DELETE
Frontend spec values rendering correctly filters by product_groups array
Confirmation dialog prevents accidental global deletion when 'All Groups' is selected
seed_data_creation: Test values created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both critical bugs in Navigation & Structure page have been fixed and verified: 1) PUT endpoints now MERGE values instead of overwriting - sending partial values preserves all existing values. 2) Deleting a spec value while working on a specific product group (e.g., Flooring) now calls toggle-group PATCH endpoint which hides the value from that group only, instead of DELETE which would remove it globally. When 'All Groups' is selected, a confirmation dialog appears before global deletion. The product_groups array on values controls visibility per group (empty array = visible everywhere).
